name_en: This signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric and other materials, it features smooth calfskin details in matching tones and a vintage gold-finish metal 'christian dior paris' logo on the front.
name_cn:
This signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric and other materials, it features smooth calfskin details in matching tones and a vintage gold-finish metal 'christian dior paris' logo on the front.
A spacious compartment with a snap and buckle closure safely holds daily essentials, while a card slot adds a refined touch. The small size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for easy carrying by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 21x19x11cm (LxHxW)
Model 9961

specs.rawTitle:

Size: 21x19x11cm (LxHxW)
